title: Untrusted Assets, Save Parsing, Paths, Privacy, and Local Security · Program Defense
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for untrusted assets, save parsing, paths, privacy, and local security and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, pygame-ce, SDL, display, input, audio, filesystem, packaging, GPU, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded local-data and privacy policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Identify protected player data and availability, untrusted files and paths, package supply chain, local attackers, and realistic consequences.
Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.
Use bounded validated data formats, reject unsafe object loading, write atomically, and recover without hiding corruption.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Threat Model · changed case · Quiz Threat Model
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 5106 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Identify protected player data and availability, untrusted files and paths, package supply chain, local attackers, and realistic consequences.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Threat Model has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Privacy Telemetry
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Privacy Telemetry: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 4808 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then inject a 400 millisecond frame stall and prove the update budget prevents a spiral of death. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Minimize diagnostics, redact paths and identifiers, require informed opt-in for telemetry, and document retention and deletion.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Privacy Telemetry.
steps.why: Retrieving Privacy Telemetry through the concrete bounded local-data and privacy policy case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Privacy Telemetry, keep Privacy Telemetry connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Minimize diagnostics, redact paths and identifiers, require informed opt-in for telemetry, and document retention and deletion.
